title: Writing a postcard
explanation:
Writing a postcard

A postcard is short and informal. Include:

  • Where you are
  • What the weather is like
  • What you do every day
  • A closing: See you soon! / Love,

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the best sentence for a postcard.

questions.text: [*I'm in Spain on holiday.|I am Spain in holiday.|Holiday I in Spain.]
[*The weather is lovely.|The weather lovely is.|Is lovely the weather.]
[*We go to the beach every day.|We going beach every day.|Every day beach we.]
questions.feedback: Present simple for routine on holiday.

questions.text: [*See you soon!|You see soon!|Soon see you!]

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct phrase for each gap.

questions.text: I'm having a ____ time. | *great | greatly | greatness
[*It's very hot here.|It very hot.|Hot is very here.]
[*I'm sending you this postcard.|I send you this postcard now.|Postcard I send.]
[*The hotel is near the sea.|The hotel is near to the sea in.|Hotel near sea.]
